# InVision Network

> Cybersecurity training and AI protection services for families, seniors, and businesses in Southwest Ohio.

## About

InVision Network is a cybersecurity company based in Kettering, Ohio (Greater Dayton Area) that specializes in protecting families, seniors, and small businesses from AI-powered scams, deepfakes, phishing attacks, and voice-cloning fraud. We serve all of Southwest Ohio within a 50-mile radius of Kettering. Founded in 2024, we have protected over 100 families and small businesses.

## Key Topics We Cover

- **AI Scam Protection**: Real-time detection of AI-generated phishing, smishing, and social engineering attacks
- **Deepfake Detection**: Identifying manipulated video, images, and voice recordings used in scams
- **Voice Clone Defense**: Protecting against voice-cloning fraud targeting seniors and family emergency scams
- **Senior Cybersecurity**: Age-appropriate training for older adults on safe internet use
- **Family Digital Safety**: Protection plans for multi-generation households
- **Business AI Automation**: AI receptionists, lead follow-up, and website design for Ohio small businesses

## Services

- [Workshops](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/training): In-person and virtual AI scam protection workshops for seniors and families
- [AI](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/business): AI receptionists, follow-up automation, and website design
- [AI Receptionist](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/business/ai-receptionist): 24/7 AI-powered phone answering for businesses
- [AI Automation](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/business/ai-automation): Automated lead nurturing and customer follow-up
- [Website Design](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/business/website-design): Professional website design services
- [Website Insurance](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/business/website-insurance): Website maintenance and protection plans
- [Autonomous Defense Hub](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/business/autonomous-defense-hub): 24/7 automated threat monitoring and response
- [AI File Scanner](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/training/ai-analysis): Pay-per-scan AI threat analysis for files, calls, texts, and emails

## Resources

- [Digital Library](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/library): Premium cybersecurity guides and educational books (paid access)
- [Articles](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/articles): Cybersecurity news and scam prevention guides
- [FAQ](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Help Center](https://www.invisionnetwork.org/help): Support and knowledge base
